summary: Project with an admin dashboard featuring character management. Admins can view characters (shown 6 at a time with 'show more') and now need drag-to-reorder functionality for characters.

existing_features.title: In the `AdminCharactersPanel` component, implement drag-and-drop reordering of the character list. Each character row/card should be draggable. When an admin drops a character into a new position, the new order should be immediately reflected in the UI (optimistic update) and persisted to the backend via the reorder mutation.

new_feature_requests.summary: Allow admins to drag and reorder characters in the admin dashboard

Add a `displayOrder` field to the character data model in the backend to persist the admin-defined sort order for characters. Expose a new update-order endpoint (e.g., `reorderCharacters`) that accepts an array of character IDs in the desired order and updates their `displayOrder` values accordingly.
